title: FeeModalityTypeValues
description: Fee modality types describe how, when, and under what conditions a fee is applied and calculated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Application Timing Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Describes when the fee is applied.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Calculation Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Describes how the fee is calculated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Currency Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Describes the currency context in which the fee is applied.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Posting Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description: Describes how and when the fee is posted to the customer account.
